issue.title: [VectorCombine] foldShuffleOfCastops - failure to handle unary shuffles to fold shuffle(cast(x), poison) -> cast(shuffle(x,poison))
issue.body: foldShuffleOfCastops currently requires both shuffle operands to be the same castop with the same src/dst types, preventing it from being used for unary shuffles where the second operand is unused / set to poison.
issue.author: RKSimon

comments.author: ckoparkar
comments.body: If I understand this correctly, `VectorCombine::foldShuffleOfCastops` has a check `if (C0->getSrcTy() != C1->getSrcTy()) return false;` which needs to be relaxed to allow one of them to be a undef/poison?

comments.author: RKSimon
comments.body: Yes some of the logic will need to be refactored to be only handled when the second operand is not a PoisonValue

comments.author: ckoparkar
comments.body: I see. I'd like to give it a go if that's alright?

comments.author: ckoparkar
RKSimon
comments.body: if we just match poison we don't actually care about references to the second operand - its only if we allow undef it gets trickier
